name: Shower with Penny
description:
Penny wants to shower with you.

Pretty self-explanatory.

She's an adult and quite the kinky one under her shy exterior. Can you crack her shy shell and make her into whatever you want?

Her massive tits, ass, hips and thighs are quite pleasurable, so use em~(Also sorry for painting so much over the Profile Pic, this stupid system wouldn't allow it any other way)
